items.headline: Luka Doncic Exits Lakers-Thunder Game with Hamstring Injury, MRI Scheduled
items.summary: Lakers star Luka Doncic left Thursday night's game against the OKC Thunder due to a left hamstring injury and is scheduled for an MRI on Friday to determine the severity. His exit casts a shadow over the Lakers' playoff preparations.

items.headline: Nikola Jokic Achieves Historic Back-to-Back Triple-Double Season
items.summary: Denver Nuggets center Nikola Jokic officially averaged a triple-double for the 2025-26 season on April 2, 2026, becoming only the second player in NBA history to accomplish this feat in consecutive seasons, joining Russell Westbrook.

items.headline: Deni Avdija Fuels Blazers' Win with 26 Points
items.summary: Israeli forward Deni Avdija contributed 26 points, eight rebounds, seven assists, and two steals to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 118-106 victory over the New Orleans Pelicans. This performance continues his strong play as the Blazers extend their winning streak.

items.headline: Thunder Rout Lakers in Dominant Performance
Spurs Extend Win Streak Against Clippers
Shai Gilgeous-Alexander Shines with 28 Points
items.statContext: Led Thunder in dominant win over Lakers.

items.headline: Jrue Holiday Leads Blazers with 27 Points, Seven Threes
items.statContext: Key performance in Blazers' victory over Pelicans.

items.headline: Deni Avdija's All-Around Masterclass: 26 Points, 8 Rebounds, 7 Assists
items.statContext: Filled the stat sheet in Blazers' win.

items.headline: Rookie Kon Knueppel Sets Hornets' Season 3-Point Record
items.statContext: No. 4 overall pick set a new franchise record for 3-pointers in a season with 261.

items.headline: De'Aaron Fox Fuels Spurs with 22 Points, 7 Rebounds, 5 Assists
Sean Pedulla Named NBA G League Rookie of the Year
items.statContext: Former Edmond Memorial standout recognized for his stellar G League season.

items.headline: Luka Doncic to Undergo MRI on Left Hamstring
items.summary: Following his early exit from Thursday's game, Lakers guard Luka Doncic will have an MRI on Friday to assess the severity of his left hamstring injury, a recurring issue for the star player.

items.headline: Stephen Curry Nearing Return for Warriors
items.summary: Golden State Warriors star Stephen Curry, sidelined for 27 straight games with a right knee injury, scrimmaged 5-on-5 for the third consecutive day and could return as soon as Sunday.

items.headline: San Antonio Spurs Extend Winning Streak to 11 Games
items.summary: The San Antonio Spurs continued their red-hot form, securing their 11th consecutive victory with a 118-99 win over the Clippers, improving their season record to 59-18.

items.headline: Injury Report: Giddey, Turner, Kuzma Among Those Sidelined
items.summary: Bulls' Josh Giddey is questionable for Friday's game with a hamstring injury. Myles Turner and Kyle Kuzma of the Bucks are out, along with Michael Porter Jr. (BKN), Anthony Black (ORL), Jonathan Isaac (ORL), Dereck Lively II (DAL), and Kyrie Irving (DAL) facing various ailments.
